reasoning: The base rate for a top NFL contender to win the Super Bowl mid-season is around 10-15%. The background data shows the Polymarket price was 12% on October 16. The Chiefs started the 2025 season struggling but have rallied to a 4-3 record with a massive 31-0 victory over the Raiders on October 19. They have also recovered key offensive pieces like Rashee Rice. As of October 21, an article from The Athletic highlights that the Chiefs have just overtaken the Buffalo Bills as the new Super Bowl favorites at BetMGM following a Bills loss. Given that they are the current betting favorites in a tightly contested field, their odds are likely in the +500 to +650 range, implying a probability of around 12-14% after removing vig. I will set my estimate slightly higher than the older market price of 12% to account for their recent dominant win and promotion to betting favorites.
